name: io.github.Inefavel/sfmc-mcp-server
description: MCP Server para Salesforce Marketing Cloud: valida queries do Automation Studio antes de rodar.

environmentVariables.description: Subdomínio da instância SFMC (a parte antes de .auth.marketingcloudapis.com)
environmentVariables.name: SFMC_SUBDOMAIN

environmentVariables.description: Client ID do Installed Package (API Integration Server-to-Server)
environmentVariables.name: SFMC_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: MID da Business Unit alvo (opcional; usa a BU padrão do package se omitido)
environmentVariables.name: SFMC_ACCOUNT_ID
